message:
fix(io_uring): coalesce wake() eventfd notifications to reduce syscall overhead

Add AtomicBool wake_pending flag to IoUringReactor that prevents redundant
eventfd write() syscalls when multiple wake() calls occur before the
completion queue is drained. The flag is set on the first wake() via
atomic swap, and cleared when the completion handler processes the wakeup
event (before draining the fd, so concurrent wakes during the drain window
still enqueue a fresh notification). On write failure, the flag is also
cleared to avoid permanently suppressing future wakes.

New test verifies that 32 rapid wake() calls succeed and produce only a
single completion event after a single poll cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
